attacking_style: Insufficient data to establish clear attacking patterns. Limited observations show involvement in breakaways but lacks decisive finishing acceleration when it matters.
team_tactics: Insufficient observations to determine team support patterns or tactical setup.
terrain_preference: Appears suited to stage racing and climbing terrain sufficient to reach final positions, but lacks explosive power on steep accelerations that decide outcomes among climbing specialists.
vulnerability: Exposed when pure climbing accelerations occur - unable to respond to sharper attacks from peers like Woods. Conservative racing when defending position suggests concern about finishing speed in direct confrontations.
key_patterns: Defensive positioning when protecting GC placement rather than aggressive racing (2 observations)
Inferior acceleration compared to climbing specialists in decisive moments (2 observations)
Capable of reaching front groups but struggles to contest final selection
form_trajectory: neutral: Secured 2nd overall at Tirreno-Adriatico but defensive approach and inability to respond to accelerations suggests plateau rather than growth
